nasb.text: Balaam said to Balak, “Build seven altars for me here and prepare seven bulls and seven rams for me here.”

esv.text: And Balaam said to Balak, “Build for me here seven altars and prepare for me here seven bulls and seven rams.”

cnv.text: 巴蘭對巴勒說：“你要在這裡給我築七座祭壇，也要為我預備七頭公牛和七隻公綿羊。”

ccb.text: 巴兰对巴勒说：“你在这里为我筑七座祭坛，预备七头公牛和七只公绵羊。”
